decision.summary: Open a new weekly bearish BTC position on the 66k dip market.
decision.rationale: There are no open BTC positions to manage first. The latest Beecthor transcript and recent summaries keep the macro thesis bearish after a rebound/squeeze, and Binance now shows BTC at 67825.32 after extending into the rebound zone near 68k, which fits the setup for renewed downside. Under nearest-strike-first, the closest weekly bearish strike below price is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-66k-march-30-april-5`, and its 67.0% Yes probability is inside the preferred range while giving the thesis time to play out early in the week. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.

validation.message: Nearest-strike-first rule rejected the proposed market

details.rejected: Nearest-strike-first rule rejected the proposed market
